repos.name: income-reporting-playbook
repos.description: The Income Reporting Playbook will offer guidance and templates to improve the client experience of providing income during benefit applications and renewals. It is currently being developed by Nava in conjunction with USDS and DSAC.

repos.name: iv-cbv-payroll
repos.description: Consent-Based Verification (CBV) is a prototype that allows benefit applicants to verify their income directly using payroll providers. It is currently being piloted for testing and validation purposes.

commits.message:
No ticket: Remove flashes when CS flow returns to activity hub (#1403)

Tom removed the flashes about adding or updating activities. I added some back in. This ticket removes the ones I added back in.
commits.author: Tim Miller

commits.message:
FFS-3795: Change name of test agency to remove CBV (#1402)

Got the go ahead to remove CBV everywhere, including for CBV flows, not just Activity to prevent any branching logic since it's just test content.
commits.author: Daphne Gold

commits.message:
FFS-3740: Community Service review page (#1394)

Added a Review page as the final page in the Community Service flow.
Refined edit workflows from the hub and from the review page to work as you might expect.
Refactored the month addition flow to make urls more sensible.
commits.author: Tim Miller

commits.message:
Bump nokogiri in /app in the bundler group across 1 directory (#1401)

Bumps the bundler group with 1 update in the /app directory: [nokogiri](https://github.com/sparklemotion/nokogiri).


Updates `nokogiri` from 1.19.0 to 1.19.1
- [Release notes](https://github.com/sparklemotion/nokogiri/releases)
- [Changelog](https://github.com/sparklemotion/nokogiri/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)
- [Commits](https://github.com/sparklemotion/nokogiri/compare/v1.19.0...v1.19.1)

---
updated-dependencies:
- dependency-name: nokogiri
  dependency-version: 1.19.1
  dependency-type: indirect
  dependency-group: bundler
...

Signed-off-by: dependabot[bot] <support@github.com>
Co-authored-by: dependabot[bot] <49699333+dependabot[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
commits.author: dependabot[bot]
